name: Awab (أواب)
description: A comprehensive Islamic application featuring the Holy Quran with audio recitation, prayer times, Qibla direction, and notifications.
features: Full Quran reading experience with translation, Tafsir, and high-quality audio recitation.
Precision prayer times calculation based on astronomical formulas.
Automatic, customizable Adhan notifications even in background mode.
Interactive Qibla compass utilizing geomagnetic device sensors.
my_role: Core Mobile Architect - Solved complex prayer time scheduling challenges across different countries by implementing reliable timezone handling, daylight-saving adjustments, and precise local notification scheduling to ensure accurate Adhan delivery.
